fields.content: Just took Cooper for a long run in the park. His tail hasn't stopped wagging! 🐕❤️ #GoldenRetriever
Are raw food diets really better for pugs? Looking for some honest advice from fellow dog parents! 🦴🐾
Caught him chewing my favorite sneakers again. Look at those guilty eyes... I can't even stay mad! 👟🐶
Bath day is officially over! Now she is doing the post-bath zoomies all over the living room rug. 🛀✨
Training tip of the day: consistency is key! Max finally learned how to 'roll over' after a week of practice. 🏆
Cooper found the biggest stick in the park today and refused to drop it all the way home! 🌲🐕
The pug snore is louder than a freight train tonight. How can someone so small make so much noise? 😴💤
Woke up to find Max stole all my socks and hid them under his bed. Truly a criminal mastermind. 🧦🐶
Daisy got mistaken for a sheep at the park today. To be fair, she desperately needs a haircut. 🐑✂️
Early morning hike with Rover. The woods are so peaceful and he loves tracking the trail. 🌲🥾
Is there anything better than Golden Retriever cuddles on a rainy Sunday? Pure happiness. 🌧️💛
Met another pug at the vet today. They did the classic head tilt at the exact same time! 🥺❤️
Paws up if your dog thinks the mailman is public enemy number one! 📬🐕 Every single day...
Her favorite spot to sleep is right on top of my laptop while I'm trying to work from home. 👩‍💻🐾
Agility class went amazing tonight! Rover got through the tunnel without stopping for once. 🏆🐕
Trying to teach Cooper not to jump on guests. He's just too friendly for his own good! 🐾😅
Someone is begging for my pizza crust right now with maximum puppy eyes. Stay strong... 🍕🐾
Max finally mastered the 'leave it' command... unless it's a piece of dropped bacon. 🥓🤷‍♂️
Just spent 20 minutes untangling burrs from her fluff. She thinks it was a fun game. 🐕🌾
Testing a new indestructible toy today. Let's see if it lasts more than ten minutes. 🦴🤞
Brushing out the undercoat today. Pretty sure I have enough fur to build a second dog. 🐕🧹
Bought a little raincoat for Barnaby. He absolutely hates it and refuses to walk. Help! 🌧️😂
That look he gives me when I say the word 'W-A-L-K'. He definitely knows how to spell! 🦮🎉
Homemade peanut butter dog treats are in the oven! Daisy is guarding the kitchen like a soldier. 🥜🐾
A tired dog is a happy dog. Rover is completely knocked out after our beach trip today. 🏖️💤
